certificateId.description: The ID of the certificate. IoT issues a default subject name for the certificate (for example, IoT Certificate).

packageName.description: The name of the new software package.

versionName.description: The name of the new package version.

sbom.description: A specific software bill of matrerials associated with a software package version.

sbomValidationStatus.description: The status of the initial validation for the software bill of materials against the Software Package Data Exchange (SPDX) and CycloneDX industry standard formats.

jobId.description: The unique identifier you assigned to this job when it was created.

description.description: A short text description of the job.

jobId.description: The unique identifier you assigned to this job when it was created.

description.description: A short text description of the job.

billingGroupName.description: The name you gave to the billing group.

certificateArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the certificate. You can use the ARN as a principal for policy operations.

certificateId.description: The ID of the certificate. Certificate management operations only take a certificateId.

commandArn.description: The Amazon Resource Number (ARN) of the command. For example, arn:aws:iot:<region>:<accountid>:command/<commandId>

metricName.description: The name of the custom metric to be used in the metric report.

metricArn.description: The Amazon Resource Number (ARN) of the custom metric. For example, arn:aws-partition:iot:region:accountId:custommetric/metricName

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the created dimension.

queryString.description: The dynamic thing group search query string.

metricName.description: The name of the fleet metric to create.

metricArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the new fleet metric.

jobId.description: The unique identifier you assigned to this job.

jobTemplateId.description: The unique identifier of the job template.

actionArn.description: The ARN for the new mitigation action.

actionId.description: A unique identifier for the new mitigation action.

awsIotJobId.description: The IoT job ID associated with the OTA update.

awsIotJobArn.description: The IoT job ARN associated with the OTA update.

packageArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the package.

packageVersionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the package.

packageName.description: The name of the associated software package.

versionName.description: The name of the new package version.

attributes.description: Metadata that were added to the package version that can be used to define a package version’s configuration.

status.description: The status of the package version. For more information, see Package version lifecycle.

errorReason.description: Error reason for a package version failure during creation or update.

policyDocument.description: The JSON document that describes the policy.
The JSON document that describes the policy.

isDefaultVersion.description: Specifies whether the policy version is the default.

templateArn.description: The ARN that identifies the provisioning template.

defaultVersionId.description: The default version of the provisioning template.

templateArn.description: The ARN that identifies the provisioning template.

isDefaultVersion.description: True if the provisioning template version is the default version, otherwise false.

securityProfileName.description: The name you gave to the security profile.

thingTypeArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the thing type.

statusCode.description:
The status code for the command deletion request. The status code is in the 200 range for a successful request.

  • If the command hasn't been deprecated, or has been deprecated for a duration that is shorter than the maximum time out duration of 12 hours, when calling the DeleteCommand request, the deletion will be scheduled and a 202 status code will be returned. While the command is being deleted, it will be in a pendingDeletion state. Once the time out duration has been reached, the command will be permanently removed from your account.

  • If the command has been deprecated for a duration that is longer than the maximum time out duration of 12 hours, when calling the DeleteCommand request, the command will be deleted immediately and a 204 status code will be returned.

certificateArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the registered certificate.

certificateId.description: The ID of the registered certificate. (The last part of the certificate ARN contains the certificate ID.

taskId.description: The unique identifier for the audit mitigation task. This matches the taskId that you specified in the request.
The unique identifier of the task.
The ID of the on-demand audit you started.

isAuthenticated.description: True if the token is authenticated, otherwise false.

refreshAfterInSeconds.description: The number of seconds after which the temporary credentials are refreshed.

disconnectAfterInSeconds.description: The number of seconds after which the connection is terminated.

version.description: The latest version of the billing group.

displayName.description: The updated user-friendly display name in the console for the command.

description.description: The updated text description of the command.

deprecated.description: The boolean that indicates whether the command was deprecated.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The date and time (epoch timestamp in seconds) when the command was last updated.

metricName.description: The name of the custom metric.

metricArn.description: The Amazon Resource Number (ARN) of the custom metric.

metricType.description:
The type of the custom metric.

The type number only takes a single metric value as an input, but while submitting the metrics value in the DeviceMetrics report, it must be passed as an array with a single value.

displayName.description: A friendly name in the console for the custom metric

creationDate.description: The creation date of the custom metric in milliseconds since epoch.

lastModifiedDate.description: The time the custom metric was last modified in milliseconds since epoch.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN)of the created dimension.

stringValues.description: The value or list of values used to scope the dimension. For example, for topic filters, this is the pattern used to match the MQTT topic name.

creationDate.description: The date and time, in milliseconds since epoch, when the dimension was initially created.

lastModifiedDate.description: The date and time, in milliseconds since epoch, when the dimension was most recently updated.

domainConfigurationName.description: The name of the domain configuration that was updated.

domainConfigurationArn.description: The ARN of the domain configuration that was updated.

actionArn.description: The ARN for the new mitigation action.

actionId.description: A unique identifier for the mitigation action.

securityProfileName.description: The name of the security profile that was updated.

securityProfileArn.description: The ARN of the security profile that was updated.

behaviors.description: Specifies the behaviors that, when violated by a device (thing), cause an alert.

alertTargets.description: Where the alerts are sent. (Alerts are always sent to the console.)

additionalMetricsToRetain.description:
Please use UpdateSecurityProfileResponse$additionalMetricsToRetainV2 instead.

A list of metrics whose data is retained (stored). By default, data is retained for any metric used in the security profile's behaviors, but it is also retained for any metric specified here.

additionalMetricsToRetainV2.description: A list of metrics whose data is retained (stored). By default, data is retained for any metric used in the profile's behaviors, but it is also retained for any metric specified here. Can be used with custom metrics; cannot be used with dimensions.

version.description: The updated version of the security profile.

creationDate.description: The time the security profile was created.

lastModifiedDate.description: The time the security profile was last modified.

metricsExportConfig.description: Specifies the MQTT topic and role ARN required for metric export.

version.description: The version of the updated thing group.

validationErrors.description: The list of any errors found in the behaviors.
